---
name: New Prompt
about: Suggest a new prompt template for the library
title: 'Prompt: '
labels: prompt
assignees: ''
---

**Prompt title**
What would you call this prompt?

**Category**
Which category does it belong to? (frameworks, model-specific, system-prompts, marketing, development, data, business, image-generation)

**Description**
What does this prompt do? When would you use it?

**Template (optional)**
If you have a draft of the prompt template, paste it here.
